examples: His strength gave out during the race.
They gave out samples to customers.
He gave out brochures at the event.
Volunteers gave out food to the homeless.
She gave out the exam papers.
Our supplies gave out after a week.
They gave out flyers on the street.
The food gave out before everyone was fed.
example_translate: Его силы иссякли во время гонки.
Еда закончилась до того, как все накормились.
give out.synonyms:
Раздавать, распространять - distribute, hand out, pass out
Заканчиваться, иссякать - run out, be exhausted, deplete
